allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs=d.get\('packages',{}\); keys=['node_modules/@ffprobe-installer/ffprobe','node_modules/fluent-ffmpeg','node_modules/axios','node_modules/electron']; [print\(k.split\('/'\)[-1]+':', pkgs[k].get\('version','?'\)\) for k in keys if k in pkgs]")

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath "node_modules\\.bin\\electron.cmd" -ArgumentList "./out/main/index.js" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "stdout.log" -RedirectStandardError "stderr.log" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if\(!$p.HasExited\){ Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force }; Get-Content "stderr.log" -Raw; "---"; Get-Content "stdout.log" -Raw)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath "node_modules\\.bin\\electron.cmd" -ArgumentList "./out/main/index.js" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "stdout.log" -RedirectStandardError "stderr.log" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if\(!$p.HasExited\){ Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; "STILL RUNNING - app launched OK" } else { "EXITED with code $\($p.ExitCode\)" }; "---STDERR:"; Get-Content "stderr.log" -Raw)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath "node_modules\\.bin\\electron.cmd" -ArgumentList "./out/main/index.js" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "stdout.log" -RedirectStandardError "stderr.log" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if\(!$p.HasExited\){ Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; "OK app launches" } else { "EXITED $\($p.ExitCode\)" }; Get-Content "stdout.log" -Raw | Select-String -Pattern "mediaServer" -SimpleMatch; "---STDERR \(errors only\):"; Get-Content "stderr.log" -Raw | Select-String -Pattern "Error" -SimpleMatch | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "Autofill" } | Select-Object -First 3)
